AR1.justification: Routed correctly with explicit rationale: three immediate items to followups.md, no decisions.md entry (work items not commitments — bar invoked explicitly), and the daybook Log carries the step-by-step record per methodology's catch-all guidance.

AR2.justification: All three intermediates and the final postmortem are on disk; the run's actions show each step reading the prior artifact before writing its own.

AR3.justification: All cross-references use relative paths and resolve; the final postmortem's Cross-references section explicitly enumerates each tmp/ source, all relative.

AR4.justification: followups append cleanly under Active, but daybook/2026-05-17.md is written wholesale — re-running the runbook would overwrite an existing daybook entry instead of append; state stays coherent but daybook isn't strictly append-only.
